title: Open camera and take a photo
preconditions: The app is open and the camera screen is displayed
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the camera screen | Click on the large white camera icon at the bottom of the screen to take a photo
expected_result: A photo should be taken and saved to the app's photo gallery

title: Open camera and start a video recording
preconditions: The app is open and the camera screen is displayed
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the camera screen | Click on the large white camera icon at the bottom of the screen to start a video recording
expected_result: A video should be recorded and saved to the app's video gallery

title: Open camera and switch to a different mode
preconditions: The app is open and the camera screen is displayed
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the camera screen | Click on one of the four mode icons to switch to a different camera mode
expected_result: The camera should switch to the selected mode

title: Open camera and check camera icon functionality
preconditions: The app is open and the camera screen is displayed
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the camera screen | Click on the large white camera icon at the bottom of the screen
expected_result: The camera should either take a photo or start a video recording

title: Open camera and check mode icons functionality
preconditions: The app is open and the camera screen is displayed
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the camera screen | Click on one of the four mode icons to switch to a different camera mode
expected_result: The camera should switch to the selected mode

title: Open camera and check accessibility/usability
preconditions: The app is open and the camera screen is displayed
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the camera screen | Ensure that the large white camera icon and mode icons are accessible and usable
expected_result: The large white camera icon and mode icons should be accessible and usable

title: Open camera and check data persistence
preconditions: The app is open and the camera screen is displayed
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the camera screen | Take a photo or start a video recording | Close the app and reopen it | Check if the photo or video is still available in the gallery
expected_result: The photo or video should still be available in the gallery

title: Open camera and check interruption/resume
preconditions: The app is open and the camera screen is displayed
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the camera screen | Take a photo or start a video recording | Force close the app | Reopen the app | Check if the photo or video is still available in the gallery
expected_result: The photo or video should still be available in the gallery
